healthcare_bounded_contexts.description: Healthcare systems benefit from clear bounded context separation for clinical and administrative processes

recommended_contexts.name: Billing & Claims
recommended_contexts.responsibility: Financial processing, insurance claims, TISS integration

patient_aggregate.consistency_boundary: All patient data modifications go through Patient aggregate root
invariants: Patient must have at least one contact method
Medical history entries are immutable once created
privacy_rules: LGPD: Professional secrecy for intra-institutional access
LGPD: Written consent for inter-institutional access

claim_aggregate.consistency_boundary: All claim-related operations maintain TISS 4.0 compliance
invariants: Claim must have all TISS mandatory fields
Claim amount must match sum of line items
Glosas can only be applied to approved claims

domain_events.description: Events ensure loose coupling between bounded contexts and enable event sourcing

healthcare_event_patterns.lgpd_consideration: Event payload should not contain sensitive health data; use references

healthcare_event_patterns.tiss_consideration: Event must include TISS transaction ID for traceability

healthcare_event_patterns.audit_consideration: Record glosa justification and responsible party

partnership: Patient Management and Medical Records: Shared patient identity
Medical Records and Billing: Shared procedure codes
customer_supplier: Authorization (upstream) to Billing (downstream): Authorization approval required before billing
Medical Records (upstream) to Claims (downstream): Clinical data feeds claim generation
conformist: All contexts to TISS 4.0 Standard: Must conform to ANS specifications
All contexts to LGPD: Must conform to ANPD regulations
anticorruption_layer: Internal domain model to TISS XML: ACL transforms between domain objects and TISS format
Internal domain model to External insurance APIs: ACL protects domain from external changes

entities.description: Objects with identity that persist over time

value_objects.description: Immutable objects defined by attributes, no identity

domain_services.description: Operations that don't naturally belong to entities or value objects
examples: ClaimValidationService: Validates TISS XML against ANS schemas
FinancialProvisionService: Calculates financial provisions based on claim data
LgpdComplianceService: Checks data access permissions and logs access

repositories.description: Abstractions for aggregate persistence and retrieval

architecture_benefits.maintainability: Each bounded context reflects real clinical/administrative process
architecture_benefits.auditability: Clear aggregate boundaries enable comprehensive audit trails
architecture_benefits.compliance: Aggregates and domain events ensure LGPD-compliant data handling
architecture_benefits.flexibility: Bounded contexts allow independent evolution of clinical and financial systems
architecture_benefits.security: Patient aggregate encapsulates data and enforces privacy rules
